headline: Fortinet heads into earnings with product growth in the spotlight
summary: Fortinet Inc (NASDAQ:FTNT) is set to report its second quarter results on July 29, with Jefferies analysts highlighting that the company needs to show an acceleration in product revenue growth to support investor confidence in the durability of its recent performance. headline: Intel Earnings Prediction Market Preview: What Will Lip-Bu Tan Say?
summary: Intel reports Q2 earnings today. Kalshi traders bet on which words Lip-Bu Tan says, from Foundry to Mobileye, and why Apple sits at just 22%.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Neutral on Fortinet, Raises Price Target to $165
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Jonathan Ruykhaver   maintains Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $110 to $165.
